name: Cursed
description: An unfathomable echo flows in your bloodline, marking you with both supernatural gifts and ominous burdens.

feats.name: Spellcasting
feats.description:
Your curse grants you access to dangerous supernatural power. Gain access to actions and spells that require spell casting. Your spellcasting features are as follows:
- You are a **Limited-caster**.
- Your **source** is **Soul**.
- Your **Spellcasting Modifier** is **Will**.
- Your total **reservoir** equals _(½ × Tier) + Spellcasting Modifier_ (rounded up).
- Start with Two **Known Spells** at Tier 1.
- Your **prepared spells** equal your **Spellcasting Modifier**.
- Your **Spell DC** = 10 + Spell Tier + Spellcasting Modifier.
- Each **Respite** restores spell points equal to your **Spellcasting Modifier** (minimum 3).
- You gain two **Cantrips** from the **Soul** source.

feats.name: Broken As Well
feats.description: When you land a **Critical Hit** or are struck by a **Critical Hit**, you may choose one target within range to suffer 1d4 penalty to **Attack Rolls** until the end of your next turn. The target is considered to be **Hexed**.

feats.name: Bond Mark
feats.description: You mark one willing creature, as long as this creature is within 1 mile, both of you can sense each others **emotions** and **vitals**. You are also unable to lie to each other.

feats.name: Forbidden Knowledge
feats.description: When dealing with matters revolving around **Forbidden** lore and research, you have **Resolve** on **Skill Checks** related to it.
